title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Gaurs Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Gaurs Group
jsonLd.description:
Gaurs Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Gaurs Group:
Gaurs Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
